title: Meta Muse Spark Signals a Break From Llama Strategy
summary: Meta Muse Spark Signals a Break From Llama Strategy top of page Meta just released Muse Spark as a paid proprietary model. This move contradicts the open source push that defined its Llama releases for three years.
content: Meta Muse Spark Signals a Break From Llama Strategy top of page Meta just released Muse Spark as a paid proprietary model. This move contradicts the open source push that defined its Llama releases for three years. The company had positioned Llama as the alternative to closed systems from OpenAI
